grant_title: Basic Human Needs Emergency Assistance Grant
eligible_applicant_type: Community groups with a fiscal sponsor
project_area: Emergency services and support for vulnerable residents (food security, medical aid, financial assistance, personal care items, informal case management)
demographic_requirements: Preference for programs serving all members of the general public, with priority for projects serving Asset-Limited, Income-Constrained, and Employed (ALICE) households.
eligibility_summary: Must be a 501(c)(3) nonprofit or operate under a fiscal sponsor, operational for at least one year, and not a core support grantee or recent recipient of $50,000+ from the Foundation. Organizations with operating budgets of $2.5M+ face a 'three years on, one year off' rule, except for food security-focused organizations.
